name: Progress OpenEdge database (.lg) errors
description: Progress OpenEdge database log (.lg) fatal/error conditions: SYSTEM ERROR, abnormal shutdown, lock-table overflow, server died, or '** ' error-message lines. Linux OpenEdge deployments.
query: file:~"\\.lg" _msg:~"(SYSTEM ERROR|ABNORMAL shutdown|abnormal shutdown|Lock table overflow|SrvrDied|database .* not started|\\*\\* )"
